## Meeting Purpose

[Review content progress and refine the AI-driven production process.](https://fathom.video/share/qgJw4tWbKdv6nYy3xY4YZYsLcwssxZpY?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Strategy:** The goal is to publish SEO-focused articles for topical authority, accepting they are "good enough" for web traffic but not polished thought leadership pieces for sales.](https://fathom.video/share/qgJw4tWbKdv6nYy3xY4YZYsLcwssxZpY?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)
  - [**Image Quality:** AI-generated images are failing on two fronts: incorrect brand colors and generic visuals. The solution is to manually verify hex codes and use a "code-gen" workflow for data-driven graphics.](https://fathom.video/share/qgJw4tWbKdv6nYy3xY4YZYsLcwssxZpY?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
  - [**Article Feedback:** The "Calibration" article's V2 is approved for publication. Feedback includes adding more specific, digested case studies (e.g., Toyota's TPS system) and using procedural tables for visual breaks.](https://fathom.video/share/qgJw4tWbKdv6nYy3xY4YZYsLcwssxZpY?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
  - [**Blocker:** The Looker dashboard is on hold pending GSC/GA4 access from LightSource IT.](https://fathom.video/share/qgJw4tWbKdv6nYy3xY4YZYsLcwssxZpY?tab=summary&timestamp=1888.0)

## Topics

### Content Review & Strategy

  - [**Article Status:**](https://fathom.video/share/qgJw4tWbKdv6nYy3xY4YZYsLcwssxZpY?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
      - [**Approved:** "Calibration" V2 is approved for publication.](https://fathom.video/share/qgJw4tWbKdv6nYy3xY4YZYsLcwssxZpY?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
      - [**In Review:** Ben is reviewing "Supplier Risk Management" and two others.](https://fathom.video/share/qgJw4tWbKdv6nYy3xY4YZYsLcwssxZpY?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
      - [**In Production:** Five new articles are in editing and will be shared by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/qgJw4tWbKdv6nYy3xY4YZYsLcwssxZpY?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/qgJw4tWbKdv6nYy3xY4YZYsLcwssxZpY?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)
      - [**Goal:** Publish SEO-focused articles to build topical authority and drive web traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/qgJw4tWbKdv6nYy3xY4YZYsLcwssxZpY?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This volume-based approach is distinct from highly curated, sales-enablement thought leadership.](https://fathom.video/share/qgJw4tWbKdv6nYy3xY4YZYsLcwssxZpY?tab=summary&timestamp=1108.0)
      - [**Outcome:** Spencer approved this strategy, prioritizing launch and iteration over initial perfection.](https://fathom.video/share/qgJw4tWbKdv6nYy3xY4YZYsLcwssxZpY?tab=summary&timestamp=1079.0)

### Image Generation & Quality

  - [**Problem:** AI-generated images are failing on two key metrics:](https://fathom.video/share/qgJw4tWbKdv6nYy3xY4YZYsLcwssxZpY?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
      - [**Brand Colors:** Incorrect hex codes for LightSource orange.](https://fathom.video/share/qgJw4tWbKdv6nYy3xY4YZYsLcwssxZpY?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
      - [**Visuals:** Generic, abstract graphics that don't represent article content.](https://fathom.video/share/qgJw4tWbKdv6nYy3xY4YZYsLcwssxZpY?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
  - [**Solution:**](https://fathom.video/share/qgJw4tWbKdv6nYy3xY4YZYsLcwssxZpY?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
      - [**Brand Colors:** Manually verify hex codes with a picker tool post-generation.](https://fathom.video/share/qgJw4tWbKdv6nYy3xY4YZYsLcwssxZpY?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
      - [**Visuals:** Adopt a "code-gen" workflow for data-driven graphics.](https://fathom.video/share/qgJw4tWbKdv6nYy3xY4YZYsLcwssxZpY?tab=summary&timestamp=1216.0)
          - [**Process:** LLM outputs code → Code feeds into a diagram builder (e.g., Sankeymatic) → Builder creates a deterministic image.](https://fathom.video/share/qgJw4tWbKdv6nYy3xY4YZYsLcwssxZpY?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)
          - [**Rationale:** This avoids the "hallucinations" of direct image generation, which often produces nonsensical text.](https://fathom.video/share/qgJw4tWbKdv6nYy3xY4YZYsLcwssxZpY?tab=summary&timestamp=1673.0)

  - [**Glossary:**](https://fathom.video/share/qgJw4tWbKdv6nYy3xY4YZYsLcwssxZpY?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
      - [**Status:** Topics approved.](https://fathom.video/share/qgJw4tWbKdv6nYy3xY4YZYsLcwssxZpY?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
      - [**Next Step:** Sydney (GrowthX) to create description mockups upon return from vacation.](https://fathom.video/share/qgJw4tWbKdv6nYy3xY4YZYsLcwssxZpY?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [**Blockers:**](https://fathom.video/share/qgJw4tWbKdv6nYy3xY4YZYsLcwssxZpY?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
      - [**Image Approvals:** On hold until the LightSource designer returns (next week).](https://fathom.video/share/qgJw4tWbKdv6nYy3xY4YZYsLcwssxZpY?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
      - [**Looker Dashboard:** On hold pending GSC/GA4 access from LightSource IT.](https://fathom.video/share/qgJw4tWbKdv6nYy3xY4YZYsLcwssxZpY?tab=summary&timestamp=1888.0)
